## Checklist

- [ ] Tested in the running app (light **and** dark mode if UI changed)
- [ ] New UI strings added to both `en` and `es` in `src/i18n.tsx`
- [ ] New IPC calls registered in `electron/main.ts`, `electron/preload.ts`, and `src/types.ts`
